name: empty-screenshots
title: Empty Screenshot Folder
description: Empties your screenshot folder within a configurable time period.
author: chanceaclark

commands.name: index
commands.title: Empty Screenshots
commands.description: Empties your screenshot folder older than the configured days.

preferences.name: useMacOSDefaults
preferences.description: Use the screenshot folder and file naming conventions from the macOS Screenshot app
preferences.title: macOS Screenshot App
preferences.label: Use settings from macOS Screenshot app

preferences.name: screenshotFolder
preferences.description: Location where you save your screenshots. Required when not using the macOS Screenshot app settings.
preferences.title: Screenshot Folder

preferences.name: daysToKeep
preferences.description: Number of days to keep screenshots for
preferences.title: Delete Screenshots Older Than

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
